identity.name: Md. Irshad Rain
bio: I'm a second-year Cybersecurity student focused on ethical hacking, network defence, and modern cybersecurity operations. I enjoy understanding how systems work internally, identifying vulnerabilities, and building stronger and more secure infrastructures.

Currently studying at Herald College Kathmandu under the University of Wolverhampton, while developing practical skills in penetration testing, Linux administration, networking, and cybersecurity through coursework, labs, and hands-on projects.
identity.heroHeadline: Exploring cybersecurity through ethical hacking and network defence.
identity.heroSub: Cybersecurity Student · Ethical Hacking · Network Security

skills.name: Alex Carter
bio: I'm a second-year Cybersecurity student obsessed with breaking things ethically — then building them stronger. My playground is the intersection of network defence, exploit development, and CTF competition.
When I'm not studying packets or reverse-engineering binaries, I'm contributing to open-source security tools and documenting my CTF write-ups for the community.
skills.heroSub: BSc Cybersecurity · Ethical Hacking · Network Defence

projects.title: Employee Attendance & Leave Management System
projects.description: A secure PHP and MySQL web application for managing employees, attendance records, leave requests, approvals, and reporting with authentication and CRUD operations.

projects.title: Network Packet Analyser
projects.description: A real-time Python tool for deep packet inspection and traffic visualisation on local networks. Exports to PCAP and generates summary threat reports.

projects.title: Network Security Lab
projects.description: Practical cybersecurity lab work using Kali Linux, Wireshark, Nmap, and Cisco Packet Tracer to understand scanning, packet analysis, network defence, and secure configuration.

tags.title: CTF Write-up Archive
tags.description: Documented solutions and methodology breakdowns for 25+ CTF competitions across HackTheBox, TryHackMe, and PicoCTF. Organised by category and difficulty.

tags.title: CI/CD Portfolio Website
tags.description: A React portfolio website integrated with GitHub Actions to understand continuous integration, automated build checks, and deployment workflows.

tags.title: Charity Management System
tags.description: A PHP and MySQL based charity management system with login authentication, donation tracking, dashboard features, and secure database operations.

tags.title: Auto Vulnerability Scanner
tags.description: Automated multi-threaded scanner that runs Nmap, checks CVE databases, and generates PDF vulnerability reports for small business network audits.

tags.title: E2E Encrypted Chat
tags.description: Peer-to-peer encrypted messaging application using RSA for key exchange and AES-256-GCM for message encryption. No server stores message content.
